home.heroDescription: Learn Hebrew with native Israeli teachers through live classes, recorded videos and exclusive materials. Your language journey starts here.
home.feature1Desc: Live sessions with native Israeli teachers. Interact, ask questions and practice in real time.
home.feature2Desc: High quality recorded videos available 24/7. Study at your own pace from any device.
home.methodDescription: An Ulpan is more than a course, it's an experience where you live the language from day one.
home.numberOfClassesHelper: Default is 24. You can increase as needed.
home.feature3Desc: Downloadable PDF materials, exercises and supplementary resources to reinforce each lesson.
home.whyTitle: Why study Hebrew online with Ulpan Jerusalem?
home.whySubtitle: We combine the proven methodology of traditional Ulpans with modern technology to create an effective, flexible and dynamic online learning experience.
home.whyMethodology: Our approach is based on the same structured methods used in classic Israeli Ulpans, allowing you to learn Hebrew in a clear, progressive and solid way.
home.why1Desc: We follow the official Ulpan progression in Israel, helping you build a strong foundation in reading, writing and conversation step by step.
home.why2Title: 72+ hours of live classes per course
home.why2Desc: Each level includes over 72 hours of live study, allowing you to advance solidly and effectively to the next level, with enough time to truly understand and practice the language.
home.why3Desc: Never miss a class. All sessions are recorded so you can review difficult topics, catch up when needed and learn at your own pace.
home.why4Desc: After each class you will receive a PDF summary, supplementary material and clear explanations to reinforce what you have learned.
home.why5Desc: Our app is designed to make studying simple and enjoyable. Everything is organized in one place: classes, recordings and materials.
home.why6Desc: Choose what best fits your routine: daytime or evening classes. Ideal for students and working professionals.
home.why7Desc: Connect with students from around the world who share the same goal: learning Hebrew.
home.why8Desc: Study with teachers who not only master the language, but also modern Israeli culture, everyday expressions and the real Hebrew used in daily life.
home.why9Desc: Each course includes access to an exclusive WhatsApp group where you can ask questions, practice with other students, receive ongoing support and stay motivated.
home.missionDesc: We are passionate about offering you a high-quality online learning experience. We combine our experience teaching Hebrew as a second language with modern digital tools to help you advance in a real and effective way.
home.value4: A clear path from beginner to advanced level

payment.classesIncluded: 24 classes with recorded videos, PDF materials and live Zoom classes
payment.couponDescription: If you have a discount code, enter it below. It will be validated automatically.
payment.encryptedConnection: 256-bit SSL encrypted connection. Your data is protected.
payment.paymentMethods: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Apple Pay
payment.faq1Q: Is it safe to pay on this platform?
payment.faq1A: Yes, all payments are processed through Allpay, a certified payment gateway with 256-bit SSL encryption.
payment.faq2A: Yes, you can request a refund within the first 14 days by contacting ulpanjerusalem8@gmail.com.
payment.faq3A: Once payment is completed, you will be automatically enrolled in the course and have immediate access to all materials.
payment.faq4A: Yes, you can enter your coupon code in step 2 of the payment process to apply a discount.
payment.successMessage: Your payment has been processed successfully. You are now enrolled in the course.
payment.pendingMessage: Your payment is being processed. This page will update automatically.
payment.failedMessage: There was a problem processing your payment. You can try again.
